creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
The problem here is 10.0 was built against the tagged release/10.0.0, which had different RCS IDs in various files, i.e., $FreeBSD$.

This also happened during 10.1-RELEASE, which was built against releng/10.1, during which an upgrade from 10.0 would change the RCS IDs from "$FreeBSD ... blah... release/10.0.0$" to "$FreeBSD ... blah ... releng/10.1."

This can be closed as OBE.
